markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss API key access and automation options for Prismic content management with growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Yourco's current Prismic API key grants access to both migration and custom types APIs, raising security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Three main options discussed: 1) Provide full API access, 2) Manual process, 3) JSON file transfer with Yourco handling uploads](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [No immediate hybrid solution available; Yourco to internally discuss the best path forward](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Topics

### Current Prismic Setup and Concerns

  - [Yourco uses Prismic for content management, particularly for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Blog structure: Simple setup with one repeatable slice (title, image, rich text content)](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Main concern: API key grants access to both migration and custom types APIs](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Benjamin (CTO) hesitant to provide full access without security assurances](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Automation Options Discussed

  - [Full API access: Fastest but raises security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Manual process: Current method, time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [JSON file transfer: growthx.ai provides formatted JSON, Yourco uploads](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Potential proxy service: Yourco could create a custom endpoint with different authentication](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Security and Compliance

  - [growthx.ai lacks formal certifications (e.g., SOC 2) due to early-stage status](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [They store API keys as environment variables in shared team storage and on Render for deployments](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Yourco needs to evaluate the risk and decide on comfort level with providing API access](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Prismic Limitations

  - [No separate permissions for content migration and custom types modification](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Lack of direct import option in Prismic UI](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Discussed potential feature upgrades from Prismic to address these issues](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Benjamin to discuss options with Yourco team and CEO](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Evaluate security implications of providing API access to growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Consider developing a proxy service if time and resources allow](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Explore potential code solutions to streamline the process without full API access](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Follow up with growthx.ai on the decided path forward](https://fathom.video/share/yFRk4y9AYs6h5HZMVrzwXo73FqtD8ATk?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
